title: Moroccan Couscous Couscous-Royal
description: A flavorful Moroccan dish featuring crumbled feta cheese, preserved lemon, and wood-fired baked pita bread. Perfect for a quick weeknight dinner.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the chopped onion and cook for 5 minutes, until lightly browned.
Add the minced garlic and cook for an additional 1 minute.
Add the crumbled feta cheese and chopped preserved lemon, and stir to combine.
Add the cooked couscous to the skillet and stir to combine with the feta and lemon mixture.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve hot, topped with chopped fresh parsley and warm wood-fired baked pita bread.
Garnish with additional preserved lemon and feta cheese, if desired.
Note: this recipe is for refrigerator pickling/preserving only — store in the refrigerator and consume within 1 week. Do not water-bath can without an acid (vinegar or lemon juice).
